programs.title: Fix My Flip
programs.desc: Page takes on a flipper who can't seem to make any progress on a massive, multi-million-dollar flip. But she receives major pushback.

programs.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programs.desc: A man won twice on two scratch cards in the space of five weeks. Now, he wants to buy a townhouse close to his daughter and grandson in Charlotte, North Carolina.

programs.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programs.desc: A professional poker player is ready to purchase a huge family home in Philadelphia. He wants David Bromstad to find him a modern house with unique features.

programs.title: Help! I Wrecked My House
programs.sub_title: Take Me Out of My Reno!
programs.desc: After ripping apart their entire house, first time homeowners have learned they don't have the experience or time to make a renovation happen. Now, Jasmine has just six weeks to transform their kitchen, living room and bedroom into a beach-style oasis.

programs.title: Flip Or Flop
programs.desc: Tarek and Christina flip a house with a weird vibe in Anaheim, CA. From the start, they can't tell if someone is squatting in the house or if the neighbourhood hoodlums are pranking them.

programs.title: Flip Or Flop
programs.desc: Hosts Tarek and Christina buy and flip an expensive mid-century house located in the city of Anaheim, Calif., that was designed by Cliff May, a California architect best known for developing the suburban mid-century modern design.
